result.text: PRIORITY SCAN: an ice cream vessel detected. Musical broadcast: active. Freezer integrity: {n:88-99} percent. The crew requests we shadow it. Shadow the vessel, or scan its route?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

shadow.text: Shadowing... it's turning. It's slowing. Captain, it may be initiating a STOP. The crew is vibrating. Orders?

broke.text: Pursuit broken. The mission comes first. The crew has logged this under 'sacrifices' in very large letters.

noted.text: Location starred on all charts. The ship will remember. On some future voyage, there will be ice cream, and it will be earned.

route.text: Route analysis: it serves {n:4-9} neighborhoods with a {n:88-99} percent joy delivery rate. A public service vessel. We salute it with our headlights.
